title: Gentle Strength
subtitle: Nourishing with ease and frequency
description: At this stage, you may feel full quickly and experience more fatigue. Choosing easy-to-digest, energy-rich foods in small, frequent portions can help support your strength and comfort.
what_to_expect: Need for more frequent, smaller meals
nutrition_focus: Eat small, frequent meals throughout the day
recommended_foods: Light balanced meals like dal, soft roti, rice, and sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and pumpkin
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, curd, fruit bowls, or smoothies
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals due to low appetite
hydration: Drink water in small, frequent sips
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Small, comfortable meals can still provide the nourishment your body needs.

diabetes.personalized_description: Frequent and balanced meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent nourishment supports steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods in small portions help support energy and reduce fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent intake supports your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced small meals and hydration support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Small, consistent meals support metabolic balance and steady energy.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on small, frequent, and easy-to-digest meals helps maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
